name: dotmd-cli
description: CLI for managing markdown documents with YAML frontmatter — index, query, validate, graph, export, Notion sync, AI summaries.

scripts.postversion: git push origin main --tags && gh release create v$npm_package_version --generate-notes --title v$npm_package_version && sleep 5 && gh run watch $(gh run list --workflow=publish.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId') --exit-status && sleep 10 && npm cache clean --force && npm install -g dotmd-cli@$npm_package_version
